items.context: We will deploy the hotfix after QA signs off.
items.example: The team deploys every Friday during the release window.

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: Can we deploy the hotfix before the client demo at 3 PM?

lines.speaker: DEV
lines.text: Yes, QA signed off — we'll deploy to staging first, then production.

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: Great. Ping me once the deploy finishes so I can notify the customer.

items.context: The BA clarified the requirement with the customer yesterday.
items.example: Each user story must trace back to an approved requirement.

lines.speaker: BA
lines.text: Could you confirm this requirement for the reporting module?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes — we need export to Excel; that's a must-have requirement.

lines.speaker: BA
lines.text: I'll document the requirement and share it with the dev team.
